subject: docs(mistakes): add build verification and theme-color learnings
body:
Two mistakes from the dark mode implementation:
1. Build check used vite build directly instead of npm run build,
   skipping vue-tsc — missed unused import that failed CI
2. Replaced branded status bar color with page backgrounds, causing
   visibility issues when OS color scheme differs from app theme

Tags: docs, ai-mistakes, learning
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: dark-mode
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_01XcfhH9wXBrL4DVMiGcUuY5
title: add build verification and theme-color learnings
